summary: Completed frontend UI redesign testing for Blogs4Blocks. All visual redesign features verified: muted multi-colored hero title, navbar/footer logos, category cards with gradient backgrounds and colored accent bars, blog cards with colored category badges and author avatars, how-to card with 3 steps, analytics stats card, newsletter section, and CTA section. All pages load correctly without console errors.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with colorful hero title (muted multi-colored letters) - PASS
Navbar logo has muted multi-colored letters (BLOGS4BLOCKS) - PASS
Categories section renders with 15 category cards - PASS
Category cards have colored accent bars and gradient backgrounds - PASS
Latest posts section renders with 33 blog cards - PASS
Blog cards show colored category badges and author avatars - PASS
Blog cards show stats (likes, views, time) in bottom bar - PASS
How-to card renders with 3 numbered steps (01, 02, 03) - PASS
How-to card has 'Start Writing Now' button - PASS
Analytics/Stats card shows Published Posts, Discussions, Contributors, Countries - PASS
Newsletter section renders with subscribe form - PASS
CTA section has colored 'Write Your First Post' button - PASS
Footer renders with multi-colored logo - PASS
Auth page login form loads correctly - PASS
Auth page register form loads correctly with all fields - PASS
Login flow works with test credentials - PASS
Write page form loads correctly with all inputs - PASS
Write page shows guest notice for non-logged users - PASS
Category page loads posts correctly (27 posts in social-media) - PASS
Category page has search input and back link - PASS
Post page loads with content, comments, share buttons - PASS
Post page has like button and social share section - PASS
Post page shows related posts with colored category badges - PASS
About page loads with all sections (values, how-it-works, stats, CTA) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: UI redesign implemented correctly with muted color palette from /utils/colors.js
Gradient backgrounds on cards use category-specific colors from getCategoryColor()
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Color scheme is sophisticated and elevated - not juvenile bright rainbow as requested
Stats card shows 0 contributors and 0 countries - this may be expected if no registered users have posted yet
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign testing completed. All visual features verified: muted multi-colored title/logos, gradient backgrounds on cards, colored accent bars, how-to card with 3 steps, analytics stats card. The color palette uses muted/matted colors defined in /utils/colors.js with category-specific gradients. Login flow tested with admin-digest-test@example.com credentials. All pages render without console errors.

visual_redesign_verification.category_cards: Verified - colored accent bars, colored icons, gradient backgrounds
visual_redesign_verification.blog_cards: Verified - colored category badges, colored author avatars, gradient accents, stats bar
visual_redesign_verification.howto_card: Verified - 3 numbered steps with 'Start Writing Now' button
visual_redesign_verification.analytics_card: Verified - Published Posts, Discussions, Contributors, Countries
